summary: Ambassador Programme Phase 2 (a+b+c) tested end-to-end. Created /app/backend/tests/test_ambassador_phase2.py — 17/17 pytest cases pass (canonical coupon schema, validator integration, attribution credit + idempotency, release_due promotion, clawback on cancelled order, scheduler job registration, PATCH /me guardrails [phone fmt, India INR lock, balance lock], by-code 200/404, /me new profile fields, seller_register w/ valid + invalid referral_code). Frontend: /ambassadors landing renders correctly with tier ladder + India section + 3-feature grid + Apply CTA. /ambassadors/join form renders all fields, India selection triggers the dual-code banner, POST /api/ambassadors/join succeeds and redirects to /ambassadors/dashboard. account-ambassador-btn present and routes to /ambassadors landing as expected. CRITICAL POST-JOIN AUTH BUG: anonymous user who joins via /ambassadors/join lands on /ambassadors/dashboard but sees 'Couldn't load dashboard — Missing bearer token' because POST /api/ambassadors/join returns AmbassadorMe but no access_token — the newly-created stub user has password_hash=None and no session is established. This breaks the happy-path UX for first-time enrolment.

ui_bugs.issue: After anonymous user submits /ambassadors/join, dashboard shows toast 'Couldn't load dashboard — Missing bearer token'. POST /api/ambassadors/join returns AmbassadorMe with no access_token, so the auth context has no bearer. Fix: either (a) /api/ambassadors/join issues an access_token for new stub users in its response (and frontend sets it on auth context), or (b) /join screen requires login first, or (c) /dashboard for unauthenticated users routes to a 'set your password to claim your code' screen using /api/auth/forgot-password.

integration_issues.issue: join 201 succeeds but the dashboard immediately fails on GET /api/ambassadors/me because no JWT is set. Existing logged-in users (e.g. buyer@example.com) are unaffected.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Appears repeatedly on /ambassadors. Reference: /app/frontend/app/ambassadors/index.tsx and related styles.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: surfaces during /ambassadors/join submit flow.

action_items: FIX (critical): wire access_token issuance to /api/ambassadors/join (or change frontend flow) so anonymous joiners land on a working dashboard. Right now POST /ambassadors/join creates a passwordless stub user but the FE dashboard requires Authorization header on GET /api/ambassadors/me.
Migrate deprecated style props in ambassador screens: 'shadow*' → 'boxShadow', and remove props.pointerEvents in favour of style.pointerEvents.
Optional: add a 'set your password' / 'claim your account' nudge on first dashboard load for stub users so they can withdraw later.
Optional: add /api/ambassadors/me/sales tests once orders exist (covered transitively by attribution tests today).
critical_code_review_comments: routers/ambassadors.py POST /ambassadors/join (line ~279): creates passwordless stub user but returns no access_token. Frontend join → dashboard flow is broken for anonymous users. Either issue a token here or require auth at /ambassadors/join.
services/ambassador_attribution.credit_pending_for_order: correctly idempotent via `ambassador_attribution_state` guard + conditional $set update. ✓
services/scheduler.py: both jobs (payouts_release_due 30m, ambassador_release_due 1h) registered at startup as expected. ✓
routers/seller/onboarding.py _link_ambassador_referral: idempotent ($exists guard on referred_by_ambassador_id), silent on invalid codes — matches spec. ✓

Coupon schema in /api/ambassadors/join now uses canonical fields (type=percent, value=5, active=true, valid_from, scope=all) AND retains ambassador_user_id metadata — validated end-to-end via services.coupons.validate_for_cart in tests. ✓

success_rate.frontend: ~90% — landing + join + India banner + account-ambassador-btn route ALL working; dashboard load after anonymous join is broken (missing bearer token)

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed ambassador users + orders inline and clean up after each class. No leftover state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run /app/backend/tests/test_ambassador_phase2.py — uses session-scoped fixtures that create their own ambassadors with httpx + login. Verify the anonymous-join→dashboard bug after main agent fixes /api/ambassadors/join to return an access_token (or changes the FE flow). Use viewport 390x844 for mobile. testIDs verified: amb-cta-join, amb-name, amb-email, amb-handle, amb-submit, amb-country-{NZ|IN|AU|US|GB|CA}, amb-platform-{instagram|tiktok|youtube|facebook|other}, account-ambassador-btn.
rca_of_issue: Anonymous → join → dashboard bug RCA: routers/ambassadors.py:join_program creates a passwordless stub user (`password_hash: None`) when the email isn't on file, then returns AmbassadorMe (no token). frontend/app/ambassadors/join.tsx calls joinProgram() and immediately router.replace('/ambassadors/dashboard'). The dashboard calls GET /api/ambassadors/me which requires Authorization: Bearer <jwt>; auth context still empty → toast 'Missing bearer token'. Reproduction: 1) Visit /ambassadors logged out, 2) Tap Apply to join, 3) Fill any valid form, 4) Submit — Welcome toast appears + 'Couldn't load dashboard' errors. Mitigation: have join_program issue a JWT via utils.create_token(user_id) and include it in the response shape, OR refactor frontend to require login before /ambassadors/join.
